title: Synthesis of active pharmaceutical ingredient atomoxetine via  desulfurative halogenation
author: Roviello, Giovanni
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: An innovative preparation of the Active Pharmaceutical Ingredient (API) Atomoxetine has been developed. Key  advantages of the synthetic procedure include: a one-pot preparation of a 1,3-bis-electrophilic phenyl-propionic  synthon obtained via desulfurative chlorination of an easy to make thiophenyl sulfide; an unreported strategy for  the preparation of secondary amines. The synthesis involves a total of four consecutive steps from unexpensive  and readily available reagents and employes mild conditions.

The synthesis involves a total of four consecutive steps from unexpensive  and readily available reagents and employes mild conditions.
